approved_command_preview:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'

$repo = 'malwaredevil/dcoir-collector'
$requestId = 'exec-20260603-issue197-label-inventory-001'
$repoRoot = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($repoRoot)) { $repoRoot = (Get-Location).Path }

$token = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_GITHUB_FG_TOKEN','Machine')
if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($token)) {
  $token = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_GITHUB_CL_TOKEN','Machine')
}
if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($token)) {
  throw 'No DCOIR_GITHUB_FG_TOKEN or DCOIR_GITHUB_CL_TOKEN available in Machine environment.'
}

$headers = @{
  Authorization = "Bearer $token"
  Accept = 'application/vnd.github+json'
  'X-GitHub-Api-Version' = '2022-11-28'
}

function Invoke-GitHubPagedGet {
  param([Parameter(Mandatory=$true)][string]$Uri)
  $items = @()
  $page = 1
  while ($true) {
    $separator = if ($Uri.Contains('?')) { '&' } else { '?' }
    $pagedUri = "$Uri${separator}per_page=100&page=$page"
    $batch = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri $pagedUri -Headers $headers
    if ($null -eq $batch -or @($batch).Count -eq 0) { break }
    $items += @($batch)
    if (@($batch).Count -lt 100) { break }
    $page += 1
  }
  return $items
}

function ConvertTo-UrlEncodedLabel {
  param([Parameter(Mandatory=$true)][string]$Value)
  return [System.Uri]::EscapeDataString($Value)
}

$labels = Invoke-GitHubPagedGet -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/$repo/labels"

$inventory = foreach ($label in $labels) {
  $name = [string]$label.name
  $encoded = ConvertTo-UrlEncodedLabel -Value $name
  $issues = Invoke-GitHubPagedGet -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/$repo/issues?state=all&labels=$encoded"
  $issueCount = @($issues | Where-Object { -not ($_.pull_request) }).Count
  $prCount = @($issues | Where-Object { $_.pull_request }).Count
  $classification = if ($name -like 'area:*') {
    'keep-area-candidate'
  } elseif ($name -like 'type:*') {
    'keep-type-candidate'
  } else {
    'delete-candidate'
  }

  [ordered]@{
    name = $name
    color = [string]$label.color
    description = [string]$label.description
    classification = $classification
    total_issue_or_pr_usage_count = @($issues).Count
    issue_usage_count = $issueCount
    pr_usage_count = $prCount
  }
}

$summary = [ordered]@{
  schema = 'dcoir.issue197.label_inventory.v1'
  repo = $repo
  request_id = $requestId
  collected_utc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ')
  label_count = @($inventory).Count
  keep_area_candidates = @($inventory | Where-Object { $_.classification -eq 'keep-area-candidate' }).name
  keep_type_candidates = @($inventory | Where-Object { $_.classification -eq 'keep-type-candidate' }).name
  delete_candidates = @($inventory | Where-Object { $_.classification -eq 'delete-candidate' }).name
  labels = @($inventory | Sort-Object name)
}

$reportDir = Join-Path $repoRoot "chatgpt_staging/status_reports/chatgpt-exec/$requestId"
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $reportDir | Out-Null

$jsonPath = Join-Path $reportDir 'label_inventory.json'
$mdPath = Join-Path $reportDir 'label_inventory.md'

$summary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Out-File -FilePath $jsonPath -Encoding utf8

$lines = @()
$lines += '# Issue #197 Label Inventory'
$lines += ''
$lines += "- repo: $repo"
$lines += "- collected_utc: $($summary.collected_utc)"
$lines += "- label_count: $($summary.label_count)"
$lines += ''
$lines += '## Keep area candidates'
$lines += ''
$lines += @($summary.keep_area_candidates | ForEach-Object { "- $_" })
$lines += ''
$lines += '## Keep type candidates'
$lines += ''
$lines += @($summary.keep_type_candidates | ForEach-Object { "- $_" })
$lines += ''
$lines += '## Delete candidates'
$lines += ''
$lines += @($summary.delete_candidates | ForEach-Object { "- $_" })
$lines += ''
$lines += '## Full inventory'
$lines += ''
$lines += '| Label | Classification | Issues | PRs | Total |'
$lines += '| --- | --- | ---: | ---: | ---: |'
foreach ($row in @($inventory | Sort-Object name)) {
  $safeName = ($row.name -replace '\|','/')
  $lines += "| $safeName | $($row.classification) | $($row.issue_usage_count) | $($row.pr_usage_count) | $($row.total_issue_or_pr_usage_count) |"
}
$lines | Out-File -FilePath $mdPath -Encoding utf8

Write-Host "Wrote label inventory:"
Write-Host $jsonPath
Write-Host $mdPath
